output.sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q8373902 wdt:P373 ?season .
  ?season rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en') .
  BIND(SUBSTR(?label, 1, 4) AS ?year_str) .
  FILTER(REGEX(?year_str, "^[0-9]{4}$")) .
  BIND(STR2INT(?year_str) AS ?year) .
} ORDER BY DESC(?year) LIMIT 1
